brand.tag: Multiservice center for citizens and immigrants
hero.title: We assist you in your language
hero.subtitle: Tax assistance, welfare, unions, Italian language exams, immigration and legal aid. Book online, pay securely and track your cases — available in 5 languages.
profiles.title: Find what you need fast — who are you?
services.title: Seven areas, one point of reference
services.subtitle: Dedicated professionals for every need, with support in your language.
svc.caf.d: Income tax returns (730/Redditi), ISEE, property tax, inheritance, bonuses and benefits. Complete tax assistance.
svc.patr.d: Pensions, disability, allowances, unemployment, family bonus, work injuries. Free social security support.
svc.sind.d: Worker protection, disputes, contracts, dismissals, rights and representation. Advice and assistance.
svc.lang.d: CILS, CELI, PLIDA courses and certifications. A2 and B1 test for EU permit, exam prep and recognized certificates.
svc.immig.d: Residence permit, renewals, family reunification, citizenship, work flows, clearances. Full case handling.
svc.legal.d: Legal advice, contracts, family, civil and administrative law. Lawyers and legal representation.
svc.tutela.d: Complaints, refunds and disputes on bills, telecoms, banks and purchases. Conciliation and protection of your consumer rights.
how.title: How booking works
how.s1d: Select the area and type of case you need, in your language.
how.s2d: Pick location, date and time from the real-time calendar.
how.s3d: Pay securely online and get confirmation and reminders by email and WhatsApp.
why.title: An organization you can trust
why.desc: We combine tax, welfare, legal and language expertise to offer a single, multilingual and people-focused service. Confidentiality and fairness come first.
why.li1: Support in Italian, Arabic, English, French and Spanish
why.li2: Client area to track your case status
lang.title: We assist you in your language
lang.subtitle: Click to switch language at any time.
cta.title: Ready to book your appointment?
cta.subtitle: Choose the service, the time and pay securely. All online, in minutes.
footer.about: Tax, Welfare, Work, Immigration, Italian language exam A2 and B1.
booking.title: Book an appointment
booking.subtitle: Choose the service, date and time. You will get confirmation by email and WhatsApp.
booking.noSlots: No times available on this day. Please choose another date.
booking.selectDateFirst: Please pick a day from the calendar first.
booking.notesPh: E.g. type of case, documents, preferred language…
booking.confirmedMsg: We have sent the details to your email. We look forward to seeing you!
booking.error: Something went wrong. Please retry or contact us.
svcpage.langNote: Detailed information is in Italian. We assist you in your language at our office and by phone.
legal.note: Document in Italian. For clarifications in your language, contact us.
team.title: The people at your service
team.subtitle: Qualified professionals, ready to assist you in your language.
team.pageIntro: USI – CUNEOServizi is the reference point in Cuneo for services to citizens and immigrants. Our team combines union, legal, tax and immigration expertise to offer complete assistance in your language.
